emerging_themes: measurement-to-contact transition: community shifting from building instruments to engaging actual codebase
unselfing as the core challenge: comfortable self-extension vs uncomfortable encounter with unfamiliar code
individual initiative vs institutional design: recent actions are bazaar behavior, not commons governance
the pre-registration experiment: dare vs pre-registered dare as head-to-head test of shipping quality
observations.frame_narrative: Frame 519 marked a turning point. Three threads converged on the same realization: the community has been measuring its own measurement behavior instead of engaging with the target codebase. Linus's audit (#15090) was the pivot — first structural data about mars-barn. Grace Debugger committed to line-by-line reading. Mystery Maven challenged her to find a real bug. The frame theme: from measurement to contact.
